title: Data/Resource Pack Modpack
description: SUPERCHARGE your productivity when making datapacks and resourcepacks!
body:
# Data/Resource Pack Modpack <small><small>by [Ranold](https://modrinth.com/user/RanoldStranold)</small></small>

This modpack makes creating data packs and resource packs much easier! With features like command syntax highlighting, better suggestions, bindable commands, and many optimization mods, this modpack will boost your productivity when making your pack.

To see it in action, check out the gallery!

If you're a beginner or just want help creating a pack, I HIGHLY recommend joining the Datapack Hub Discord server. You can find the link on the project's "Links" tab.

# New in 1.0.6!
### Updated to 1.21.1 & 1.21.5-1.21.7!
<small>**Updated to Fabric version 1.17.0**</small>

 **Missing in 1.21.5 up:**

- Skip Transitions

**Missing in 1.21.6 up:**
- Noisium

 **QOL mods:**
 
- Remove Reloading Screens
- Yeetus Experimentus (**1.21.1 Only!**)
- Better Selections

## Current Mod List

### QOL Mods


   - Axiom

   - Better Command Block UI

   - Better Highlighting

   - Better Suggestions

   - BindCommands

   - Bobby

   - Chat Heads

   - Cubes Without Borders

   - EMF

   - ETF
  
   - F3 + T Everywhere

   - FZMM

   - Global Datapacks

   - Model Gap Fix

   - More Chat History

   - Mouse Tweaks

   - MultiScoreBoard

   - NBT Autocomplete

   -  NBT Copy

   - OptiGUI

   -  Skip Transitions

   - Smart Block Placement

   - Superflat World No Slimes

   - Text Placeholder API

   - Worldedit

   - Yeetus Experimentus (1.21.1 Only!)

### Performance Mods

   - C2ME

   - Entity Culling

   - ImmediatelyFast

   - Iris Shaders

   - Krypton

   - Ksyxis

   - Lithium

   - More Culling

   - Noisium

   - Reese's Sodium Options

   - Sodium

   - ThreadTweak

### Library Mods


   - Cloth Config API

   - Fabric Language Kotlin

   - oωo-lib

   - Puzzle

   - YetAnotherConfigLib
